data.title: Delete original replace-classified anti-pattern tests and update .test-index
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
After replacement tests from Tasks 1 and 2 are verified passing:

1. Read the triage classification from story ca06-e969's ticket comments
2. Delete ALL original anti-pattern test files classified as "replace" from tests/skills/ and tests/agents/
3. Update .test-index atomically: replace old test paths with new replacement test paths, preserving all source-to-test mappings
4. Verify no .test-index entries reference nonexistent files
5. Run full test suite to validate suite health

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: Criterion 2 (change-detector removal) and Criterion 3 (static config update to .test-index with no branching logic).

## File Impact
- tests/skills/*.py (replace-classified originals — REMOVE)
- tests/agents/*.sh (replace-classified originals — REMOVE)
- .test-index (EDIT — update paths from old to new)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No .test-index entries reference nonexistent test files
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -c "import os,re,sys;[sys.exit(1) for line in open('.test-index') if not line.strip().startswith('#') and ':' in line for t in line.split(':',1)[1].split(',') if (tc:=re.sub(r'\[.*?\]','',t).strip()) and not os.path.exists(tc)]"
- [ ] All original replace-classified test files are deleted
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && echo "Verify manually against triage results"
